title: Salted Caramel Crisp Bars
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert bar made with caramelized sugar and crisps.
instructions: Line an 8-inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
Melt the butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
Add the caramelized sugar and stir until well combined.
Press the graham crisps into the prepared baking pan.
Pour the sugar mixture over the graham crisps.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool completely.
